title: ovs-vm-arbiter
description: Open vSwitch / Proxmox arbiter metrics (Prometheus scrape via signoz-agent). Panels filter host with IN $host. peer_ip / bridge variables apply where metrics carry those labels.

widgets.description: Gauge 1 with version and role labels.
widgets.title: Build info (latest)

widgets.description: Unix timestamp of last tick; flat line suggests stalled loop.
widgets.title: Main loop tick (unix time)

widgets.description: May mirror owner change semantics; rate shown as requested.
widgets.title: IP migrations (rate)

widgets.description: Only with prometheus_metrics_extra. Heavy series count.
widgets.title: Entry mapping info (high cardinality)
